title: Release automation
goal: Add tag-triggered GitHub release automation with packaged tarballs and checksums.
acceptance: CI publishes releases for v* tags only.
Release artifacts include packaged tarballs from scripts/package.sh.
SHA256SUMS is generated and attached to the release.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
